scripts.build:server: bun -e "console.log('No server workspace package is present yet. Add the ROY-120 server package, then wire this script to its build command.')"
scripts.build:web: bun -e "console.log('No web workspace package is present yet. Add the ROY-120 web package, then wire this script to its build command.')"
scripts.dev:server: bun -e "console.log('No server workspace package is present yet. Add the ROY-120 server package, then wire this script to its dev command.')"
scripts.dev:web: bun -e "console.log('No web workspace package is present yet. Add the ROY-120 web package, then wire this script to its dev command.')"
scripts.dev: bun -e "console.log('Server/web workspace packages are not present in this branch yet. Use bun run start for the CLI.')"
